entry.title: OCEAN PHASE
entry.summary:
Vendor: DRIP STUDIOS
Type: bottoms
Price: 2199.00

MODEL HEIGHT 5'10 AND WAIST SIZE 32 WEARING M BOTTOMS.

420 GSM COTTON FLEECE
COMBED & BIO-WASHED FINISH
NAVY BLUE WITH HIGH-DENSITY PRINT ON FRONT & EMBROIDERY NEAR ANKLE ZIP
BAGGY FIT
BELT LOOP FOR KEYS OR LIGHTER
UNISEX ARTICLE [REFER TO SIZE CHART FOR ACCURATE MEASUREMENTS].

  • Crafted from 420 GSM premium cotton fleece for a perfect balance of softness, structure, and durability.
  • Bold DRIP STUDIOS high-density graphic print on the front adds statement-driven style.
  • Embroidery detail near the ankle zipper enhances premium craftsmanship.
  • Small ankle zipper allows adjustable styling and effortless fit over sneakers.
  • Functional belt loop provides utility for holding keys, a lighter, or small essentials.
  • Straight baggy silhouette designed for relaxed comfort and versatile streetwear styling.
  • Heavyweight fabric ensures warmth, durability, and elevated street-lux appeal.

Care Guide

  • Machine wash the sweatpants inside out with like colors.
  • Use cold water to preserve fabric quality and print integrity.
  • Tumble dry on low heat or air dry to prevent shrinkage.
  • Store in a cool, dry place to maintain shape and finish.

Core Features

  • Sweatpants constructed with 420 GSM fabric for a durable and substantial feel.
  • Straight baggy fit for comfortable, versatile wear.
  • Unisex article suitable for a wide range of body types and style preferences.
  • Back pocket for convenient storage.
  • Elasticated waist for a custom fit and added style.
  • Soft, breathable jersey backing ensures all-day comfort and airflow.

entry.title: NOIR CORE
entry.summary:
Vendor: DRIP STUDIOS

Price: 2099.00

MODEL HEIGHT 5'10 AND WAIST SIZE 32 WEARING M BOTTOMS.

COMBED & BIO-WASHED FINISH
JET BLACK WITH EMBROIDERY DETAIL
BAGGY FIT
BELT LOOP FOR KEYS OR LIGHTER
UNISEX ARTICLE [REFER TO SIZE CHART FOR ACCURATE MEASUREMENTS].

  • Constructed from 420 GSM premium cotton fleece for superior structure, warmth, and durability.
  • Jet black color with signature Drip Studios embroidery detailing for understated luxury.
  • Sleek ankle zip adds refinement and allows adjustable styling.
  • Discreet belt loop enhances practicality — ideal for holding keys, a lighter, or small essentials.
  • Straight baggy silhouette designed for relaxed comfort and versatile streetwear styling.
  • Heavyweight fabric ensures premium feel without compromising flexibility or movement.
  • Perfect combination of elevated minimalism and streetwear utility for everyday wear.

Care Guide

  • Machine wash the sweatpants inside out with like colors.
  • Use cold water to preserve fabric quality and embroidery integrity.
  • Tumble dry on low heat or air dry to prevent shrinkage.
  • Store in a cool, dry place to maintain shape and finish.

Core Features

  • Sweatpants constructed with 420 GSM fabric for a durable and substantial feel.
  • Straight baggy fit for comfortable, versatile wear.
  • Unisex article suitable for a wide range of body types and style preferences.
  • Back pocket for convenient storage.
  • Elasticated waist for a custom fit and added style.
  • Soft, breathable jersey backing ensures all-day comfort and airflow.

entry.title: LUXE BOTTOMS - MELANGE GREY
entry.summary:
Vendor: DRIP STUDIOS
Type: bottoms
Price: 1998.00

MODEL HEIGHT 5'10 AND WAIST SIZE 32 WEARING M BOTTOMS.

420 GSM SOFT FLEECE LINING
COMBED & BIO-WASHED FINISH
PREMIUM 100% COTTON MATERIAL
BAGGY FIT
EMBROIDERED LOGO ON BACK POCKET
BELT LOOP FOR KEYS OR LIGHTER
ZIPPER POCKETS FOR SECURE STORAGE
UNISEX ARTICLE [REFER TO SIZE CHART FOR ACCURATE MEASUREMENTS].

  • Crafted from 420 GSM heavy-duty cotton fleece with soft internal lining for warmth, comfort, and durability.
  • Straight-cut baggy silhouette designed for relaxed comfort and versatile streetwear styling.
  • Smooth, reliable YKK zipper pockets secure belongings while maintaining a clean look.
  • Back pocket features subtle embroidery for refined branding and elevated aesthetics.
  • Functional belt loop enhances practicality for holding keys, a lighter, or small essentials.
  • Refined piping along the front adds a sophisticated, minimal streetwear touch.
  • Perfect balance of premium comfort, durability, and modern street-lux styling.

Care Guide

  • Machine wash the sweatpants inside out with like colors.
  • Use cold water to preserve fabric quality and embroidery integrity.
  • Tumble dry on low heat or air dry to prevent shrinkage.
  • Store in a cool, dry place to maintain shape and finish.

Core Features

  • Joggers constructed with 420 GSM fabric for a durable and substantial feel.
  • Straight baggy fit for comfortable, versatile wear.
  • Unisex article suitable for a wide range of body types and style preferences.
  • Back pocket for convenient storage.
  • Elasticated waist for a custom fit and added style.
  • Soft, breathable jersey backing ensures all-day comfort and airflow.

entry.title: GREY BASIC BOTTOMS
entry.summary:
Vendor: DRIP STUDIOS
Type: bottoms
Price: 1899.00

MODEL HEIGHT 5'10 AND WAIST SIZE 32 WEARING M BOTTOMS.

420 GSM TAPED COTTON FLEECE
COMBED & BIO-WASHED FINISH
STRAIGHT BAGGY FIT
MELANGE GREY MINIMAL DESIGN
UNISEX ARTICLE [REFER TO SIZE CHART FOR ACCURATE MEASUREMENTS].

  • Crafted from 420 GSM premium taped cotton fleece for a structured yet soft feel with long-lasting durability.
  • Straight baggy silhouette offers relaxed comfort and effortless everyday styling.
  • Clean, blank design allows versatile pairing with any outfit, from elevated basics to statement layers.
  • Melange grey tone adds depth and refinement while remaining easy to style year-round.
  • Taped fleece construction enhances structure while maintaining flexibility and comfort.
  • Perfect for all seasons, balancing warmth, breathability, and premium weight.

Care Guide

  • Machine wash the bottoms inside out with similar colors.
  • Use cold water to maintain fabric quality and color texture.
  • Tumble dry on low heat or air dry to preserve structure.
  • Store folded in a cool, dry place to retain shape and finish.

Core Features

  • 420 GSM taped fleece construction for a substantial premium feel.
  • Straight baggy fit designed for comfort and versatile styling.
  • Unisex silhouette suited for multiple body types.
  • Blank minimal design for effortless outfit pairing.
  • Elasticated waist for adjustable comfort and everyday wear.
  • Balanced fabric weight ideal for all-season use.

entry.title: RULES BREAKER BOTTOMS
entry.summary:
Vendor: DRIP STUDIOS
Type: bottoms
Price: 2148.00

420 GSM COTTON FLEECE
BIO-WASHED MATTE FINISH
PREMIUM 100% COTTON MATERIAL
“RULES BREAKER” HIGH-DENSITY SCREEN PRINT
YKK ZIPPER POCKETS FOR SECURE STORAGE
STRAIGHT BAGGY FIT
UNISEX ARTICLE [REFER TO SIZE CHART FOR ACCURATE MEASUREMENTS].

  • Ultra-heavy 420 GSM cotton fleece delivers superior weight, warmth, and durability.
  • Crafted for a structured yet comfortable feel suitable for everyday wear.
  • Bold “Rules Breaker” screen print on the right leg for a striking visual statement.
  • Combed, bio-washed finish enhances softness while maintaining long-lasting color depth.
  • High-quality YKK zipper pockets provide secure and functional storage.
  • Straight baggy silhouette designed for relaxed movement and modern streetwear styling.
  • Soft hand feel with a premium matte finish for elevated comfort.
  • Versatile essential that balances function, comfort, and attitude.

Care Guide

  • Machine wash the sweatpants inside out with like colors.
  • Use cold water to preserve fabric quality and print integrity.
  • Tumble dry on low heat or air dry to prevent shrinkage.
  • Store in a cool, dry place to maintain shape and finish.

Core Features

  • Sweatpants constructed with 420 GSM fabric for a substantial and durable feel.
  • Straight baggy fit for relaxed, all-day comfort.
  • Unisex article suitable for diverse body types and style preferences.
  • Elasticated waistband for adjustable fit and ease of wear.
  • Back pocket for added utility.
  • Soft, breathable jersey construction ensures comfort and airflow.

entry.title: NAVY BASIC BOTTOM
entry.summary:
Vendor: DRIP STUDIOS
Type: steal-the-drip
Price: 1799.00

MODEL HEIGHT 5'10 AND WAIST SIZE 32 WEARING M BOTTOMS.

420 GSM TAPED COTTON FLEECE
COMBED & BIO-WASHED FINISH
STRAIGHT BAGGY FIT
NAVY BLUE MINIMAL DESIGN
UNISEX ARTICLE [REFER TO SIZE CHART FOR ACCURATE MEASUREMENTS].

  • Crafted from 420 GSM premium taped cotton fleece for a structured, soft feel with long-lasting durability.
  • Straight baggy silhouette ensures relaxed comfort with a clean streetwear profile.
  • Minimal blank design allows effortless pairing with both bold graphics and everyday basics.
  • Deep navy blue tone offers a refined alternative to black while remaining timeless and versatile.
  • Taped fleece construction enhances structure without restricting movement.
  • Perfect for all seasons, delivering warmth, breathability, and a premium heavyweight finish.

Care Guide

  • Machine wash the bottoms inside out with similar colors.
  • Use cold water to maintain fabric texture and color richness.
  • Tumble dry on low heat or air dry to preserve shape.
  • Store folded in a cool, dry place to retain structure and finish.

Core Features

  • 420 GSM taped fleece for a dense, premium feel.
  • Straight baggy fit for versatile comfort and styling.
  • Unisex silhouette suited for a wide range of body types.
  • Minimal blank aesthetic for easy outfit pairing.
  • Elasticated waist for adjustable everyday comfort.
  • Balanced fabric weight suitable for year-round wear.

entry.title: DRIP BASICS SWEATPANTS – F
entry.summary:
Vendor: DRIP STUDIOS
Type: bottoms
Price: 1799.00

420 GSM.

  • Cotton fleece fabric.
  • Straight baggy fit.
  • Combed & bio washed.
  • Only for female.
  • Designed for ultimate comfort and effortless style.
  • Straight-fit joggers made from luxurious 350 GSM fabric.
  • Offers a soft feel and superior durability.
  • Features a convenient back pocket for added utility.
  • Blends practicality with everyday streetwear style.
  • Suitable for casual days or elevated street looks.
Care Guide
  • Machine wash the jogger inside out with like colors.
  • Use cold water to preserve the fabric’s quality.
  • Tumble dry on low heat or air dry to prevent shrinkage.
  • Store the jogger in a cool, dry place to prevent moisture or mold buildup.
Core Features
  • Joggers with 420 GSM (Grams per Square Meter) for a durable and substantial feel.
  • Straight baggy fit for comfortable and versatile wear.
  • Unisex article suitable for a wide range of body types and style preferences.
  • Back pocket for convenient storage.
  • Elasticated waist to adjust for a custom fit and added style.
  • Soft, breathable jersey fabric ensures comfort and airflow.
